title: London Meetup: Uniting the npmx Community!

topics.title: Documentation Alignment Issues
topics.summary: Recent discussions and fixes have focused on the alignment of the documentation pages on npmx.dev. Issues were raised regarding the inconsistent alignment of the 'Docs not available' state, leading to a merged PR that aimed to standardize the layout across different states.

topics.title: Community Engagement
topics.summary: The npmx community is actively engaging with its members through meetups and events. A recent post announced an upcoming meet in London, highlighting the project's commitment to fostering connections among users and contributors.
